entity.name: Mistral AI
entity.description: European frontier AI lab and the loudest commercial voice in EU AI Act trilogue debates. The lead industrial counterweight to US frontier labs in EU policy fights, and the cleanest case study for open-weights frontier model release policy (Mistral 7B, Mixtral).

activity.title: Speaking of Voxtral
activity.raw_text: Today we're releasing Voxtral TTS, our first text-to-speech model with state-of-the-art performance in multilingual voice generation. The model is lightweight at 4B parameters, making Voxtral-powered agents natural, reliable, and cost-effective at scale. Realistic, emotionally expressive speech in 9 popular languages with support for diverse dialects. Very low latency for time-to-first-audio. Easily adaptable to new voices. Available to test out in Mistral Studio.

_verify_phrases: our first text-to-speech model with state-of-the-art performance

enrichment.summary: Mistral released Voxtral TTS, its first text-to-speech model, featuring a 4B parameter architecture for multilingual voice generation. The model supports emotionally expressive speech in 9 languages with diverse dialect support and low latency. It is available for testing in Mistral Studio.
